findings.description: The source intro explicitly lists two concrete behaviors enabled by this feature: (1) web requests are blocked and a 503 error is returned, and (2) resident batch processes perform 空回り (idle waiting without processing). These specific outcomes are present only as hints ('503エラー', '空回り') but are absent from the s1 body text. An AI answering 'what does this feature do in web/batch contexts?' cannot retrieve this information from the section content alone.
findings.source_evidence: 「ウェブにおいて一部機能へのアクセスを遮断し、503エラーを返す。」「常駐バッチにおいて、空回り(処理せずに待機する状態)を行う。」（source intro, この機能を使うことで、以下のようなことが実現できる）
